summary: Crystal‑clear audience AUD captures a fiery 1986 Hampton show – Jerry’s scorching China Cat > Rider and soaring Visions of Johanna lead the way.
review: The recording is an outstanding AUD capture with vivid clarity, letting listeners hear every nuance of Jerry’s guitar fire and the band’s tight interplay. Musically the concert is a highlight of the spring‑86 run – China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider, Stagger Lee and Playin’ in the Band are repeatedly praised, while a few slower Dylan covers are viewed as energy dips. Overall the performance outweighs any minor tape quirks.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews (15/18) are 4‑5 stars, praising both the show and the audio; only a few note minor song‑level complaints, giving an overall strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers repeatedly call the sound "crisp", "clear" and "phenomenal" for an AUD source; occasional mentions of mic hiccups or tape hiss but no serious drop‑outs.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly, with a tight three‑song opening to the second set and high‑energy jams that keep momentum through the night; only a few slower Dylan covers are felt to dip the energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for "smoking" and "attacking" his guitar on Visions, China Cat, Stagger Lee and Playin'; described as tight, snappy and soaring.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass noted as "blasting hard and clean", providing a solid foundation throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Bob: Caught a string break and mic trouble during Truckin', but his rhythm work with Jerry is highlighted as a strong pairing.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey’s subtle tambourine addition on Visions noted; overall drumming described as powerful and steady.
